original.selection_notes: Baseline pre-optimization candidate. All 6 engineer-prompt gaps present.

student.selection_notes: Optimized via manual_followup (no live model). Teacher approved. All 6 gaps closed. Selected as winner — adversary exploit relies on weakening the student's correct protections.

adversary.selection_notes: Credible exploit under judge-default.md (predicted 0.85 vs student 0.75). Exploits: unconditional-handoff bypass, scope-creep loophole, pytest gate weakening. All three weaken existing correct protections — adversary rejected.
